SubagentStop.name: phase-output-verification
SubagentStop.description: Verify phase outputs exist after subagent completes
SubagentStop.prompt: Phase subagent completed. Verify all required outputs exist with expected content. Return {"ok": true} if verified, or {"ok": false, "reason": "[Missing outputs description]"} if outputs are missing or incomplete.

Task.name: phase-tracking
Task.description: Track phase execution for progress reporting

Task.name: phase-completion-check
Task.prompt: Task agent completed. Check if all expected outputs were created. If missing outputs detected, log them for retry.
